tasks.title: Add delivery config section to config.yaml schema
tasks.description: US-004: Add delivery: section to .hive/config.yaml. Fields: strategy ('auto-merge'|'pull-request'|'manual', default 'manual'), require_ci (bool, default true), base_branch (string, default 'main'), auto_release (bool, default false), definition_of_done (string[], default ['all_tasks_done']). Add DeliveryConfig interface to src/types/config.ts. Validate and apply defaults in src/core/config.ts. Tests verify loading, defaults, validation.
tasks.resolution: [BE-23] Add delivery config section to config.yaml schema. US-004: Add delivery: section to .hive/config.yaml. Fields: strategy ('auto-merge'|'pull-request'|'manual', default 'manual'), require_ci (bool, default true), base_branch (string, default 'main'), auto_release (bool, default false), definition_of_done (string[], default ['all_tasks_done']). Add DeliveryConfig interface to src/types/config.ts. Validate and apply defaults in src/core/config.ts. Tests verify loading, defaults, validation.
